description: Fragment from the bottom of a legal query in Hebrew. Regarding whether it is permissible to partner with a gentile for a business which requires maintaining a fire continuously for two weeks, perhaps for glass or metal manufacture. The querier's idea is that the gentile will maintain the fire on Shabbat and receive 1/7 of the profits. Is this permissible? AA/ASE
description_he: שאלה משפטית בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
